entries.description: Entries in the requested directory. Order is filesystem-dependent.

createdMs.description:
Created time, unix millis. `None` when the filesystem / platform
does not expose it.

isDir.description: `true` if this entry is a directory.

modifiedMs.description:
Last-modified time, unix millis. `None` when the filesystem /
platform does not expose it.

name.description: File or directory name (no path separators).

relpath.description: Path relative to the forge root, using forward slashes.
